items.name_en: 【LV x TM ALL IN BB Bag】M13089 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
【LV x TM ALL IN BB Bag】M13089 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
This All In BB GxHlSJ bag conveys the playful style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami re-edition series through dynamic details. The Monogram coated canvas presents the artist's colorful rainbow tones, and the nameplate features a bow and lock decoration. The adjustable calfskin handle and leather shoulder strap allow for hand-carry, shoulder carry, or crossbody wear.
Size: 18 x 12 x 16 cm.

specs.rawTitle:
【LV x TM ALL IN BB Bag】M13089 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)

Size: 18 x 12 x 16 cm.

items.name_en: 【CarryAll Handbag】 m13661 White Multi (Three Colors - Murakami)
items.name_cn:
【CarryAll Handbag】 m13661 White Multi (Three Colors - Murakami)
The CarryAll HlJH small handbag features Monogram Hl LT canvas and leather trim, creating a perfect companion for urban life. The spacious design includes a neat interior with a large inner pocket for added functionality. The Monogram canvas clutch is secured with a leather strap.
Size: 29 x 24 x 12 cm

specs.rawTitle:
【CarryAll Handbag】 m13661 White Multi (Three Colors - Murakami)
The CarryAll HlJH small handbag features Monogram Hl LT canvas and leather trim, creating a perfect companion for urban life. The spacious design includes a neat interior with a large inner pocket for added functionality. The Monogram canvas clutch is secured with a leather strap.
Size: 29 x 24 x 12 cm

items.name_en: 【LV X TM SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25 Handbag】 M13085
items.name_cn:
【LV X TM SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25 Handbag】 M13085
This Speedy Bandoulière 25 SjGx handbag features a classic Monogram pattern rendered in bright colors by Japanese artist Takashi Murakami, showcasing the dynamic charm of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series together with the bow-shaped key pouch. Calfskin creates the Toron handle and a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, while the dazzling lock and corners draw inspiration from the brand's luggage elements.
Size: 25 x 19 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)

specs.rawTitle:
【LV X TM SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25 Handbag】 M13085
This Speedy Bandoulière 25 SjGx handbag features a classic Monogram pattern rendered in bright colors by Japanese artist Takashi Murakami, showcasing the dynamic charm of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series together with the bow-shaped key pouch. Calfskin creates the Toron handle and a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, while the dazzling lock and corners draw inspiration from the brand's luggage elements.
Size: 25 x 19 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)
